message:
fix(safety): harden integer overflow, tighten safety verdict routing, and strengthen subsystem guards

Integer overflow prevention:
- bytecode_vm: add bounds check before array slot assignment to prevent
  out-of-bounds writes on malformed bytecode programs
- lease_tracker: use saturating_add() for lease expiration and renewal
  computations to prevent silent integer wraparound
- array_fast_lane: defensive arithmetic in fast-lane indexing paths

Safety decision routing:
- safety_decision_router: clarify verdict logic so "allow" requires an
  explicit allow verdict — everything else defaults to deny (fail-closed)

Subsystem hardening across:
- causal_replay, fleet_convergence, forensic_replayer: replay safety
- guardplane_calibration, cold_start_aot_governance: startup guards
- controller_composition_matrix, demotion_rollback: state transitions
- evidence_ledger, hardware_board_claim_gate: hardware validation
- hostcall_session_protocol, law_promotion_lifecycle: protocol safety
- minimized_repro_extraction, object_model: extraction correctness
- parser_oracle, quarantine_mesh_gate, react_ssr_verification: parsing
- receipt_verifier_pipeline, frankenlab_release_gate_promotion: pipeline
- specialization_rollback_gate, zero_placeholder_gate: gate logic
- opportunity_matrix, self_replacement: operational safety

All changes maintain unsafe-forbidden guarantee and deterministic replay.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -453,7 +453,7 @@ impl TypedArrayDescriptor {
         Self {
             typed_array_id: typed_array_id.to_string(),
             element_kind,
-            byte_length: element_count * byte_width,
+            byte_length: element_count.saturating_mul(byte_width),
             byte_offset: 0,
             element_count,
             buffer_detached: false,
